trigger: 接待沈家提亲使者，以及在书房被女儿劝说写下辞官奏折时

appearance_delta.face: 表情端庄肃穆，但看向女儿时眉宇间会不自觉流露出关切与纵容
appearance_delta.body: 端正挺拔，微胖的身躯显得稳重
appearance_delta.hair: 头戴乌纱官帽，发丝收拢得一丝不苟
appearance_delta.distinguishing_features: 带有古代士大夫的体面与官威，但缺乏权臣的狠厉

costume_override.outfit: 明代四品文官绯色圆领袍，胸前绣有云雁补子，腰系革带

visual_reference: A 50-year-old ancient Chinese official, slightly chubby, wearing a dark red Ming dynasty official round-collar robe with a bird rank badge and a black official hat. Kind face with wrinkles, looking dignified but with a hint of gentle concern in his eyes. Cinematic lighting, rich colors, 8k resolution, photorealistic.
